zh.St John the Baptist Churchyard, Fladbury: 英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利
zh.lifeSummary: 當Goditha Judith Bozum於1392年之前出生在英國巴金哈姆爾時，她的父親William Bozum17歲，母親Margaret Arden20歲。她於大約1407年與Robert de Olney結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1428年在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾韋斯頓 安德伍德，埋葬在英國武斯特斯爾福拉德波利。

nameMeanings.name: Bozum
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Danish: habitational name from any of several places whose name means ‘dwelling place on the edge’.
English (North Yorkshire): variant of   Boreham  . Compare   Boram  .

variants.name: Boreham
meanings: English: habitational name from Boreham (Essex), Boreham Wood in Elstree (Hertfordshire), Boreham Street in Wartling (Sussex), or Boreham in Warminster (Wiltshire). The placenames in Essex, Sussex and Hertfordshire are probably named with Old English bor ‘hill’ + ham ‘homestead’. Compare Boram and Borom .

nameMeanings.name: Judith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Biblical name, meaning ‘Jewess’ or ‘woman from Judea’, borne by a Jewish heroine whose story is recorded in the Book of Judith in the Apocrypha. Judith is portrayed as a beautiful widow who delivers her people from the invading Assyrians by gaining the confidence of their commander, Holofernes, and cutting off his head while he is asleep; without their commander, the Assyrians are duly routed. This has been a perennially popular Jewish name. In the English-speaking world it was taken up in the 16th century, having been in occasional use among Gentiles before this: for example, it was borne by a niece of William the Conqueror. It enjoyed great popularity between the 1940s and the 1960s. Today's notable bearers include the American novelist  Judith Krantz  (  b. 1928 ) and the Scottish composer  Judith Weir  (  b. 1954 ).

en.lifeSummary: When Goditha Judith Bozum was born before 1392, in Buckinghamshire, England, her father, William Bozum, was 17 and her mother, Margaret Arden, was 20. She married Robert de Olney about 1407. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. She died in 1428, in Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, and was buried in Fladbury, Worcestershire, England.

Elle est décédée en 1428, à Weston Underwood, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, et a été enterrée à Fladbury, Worcestershire, Angleterre.

ja.lifeSummary: Goditha Judith Bozumが1392年以前にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアで生まれた時，父William Bozumは17歳，母Margaret Ardenは20歳であった。約1407年にRobert de Olneyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は1428年にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアウエストン ウンデルウッドで死去し，イギリスウオルセステルシュアイアフラドブリーにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Goditha Judith Bozum(이)가 1392년 이전 영국 벅잉함실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 William Bozum(은)는 17세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Arden(은)는 20세였다. 그녀는 대략 1407년 Robert de Olney(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1428년 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 웨스턴 운더우드에서 사망했으며 영국 워스스터실르 플라드버이에 묻혔다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Goditha Judith Bozum родилась перед 1392 г. в местности буккингхамшир, Англия, её отцу по имени William Bozum было 17 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Arden, 20. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Robert de Olney около 1407 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1428 г. в местности вестон ундирвуд, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания и была похоронена в местности фладбури, ворсестиршир, Англия.
